docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $350.00) SERVED DEC-22-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSEN, CARICE
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/19/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DABADIA, ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSEN, CARICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-07-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ELLEN DABADIA ASSISTED BY NON CERTIFIED INTERPRETER RAFAEL GOMES WITH PORTUGUES. NON-CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH BY CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. DEFENDANT CARICE ANDERSEN DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DABADIA, ELLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSEN, CARICE $3,840.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,040.00, COST REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
